title: Imaging Provenance Cannot Be Verified
scenario: A clinical decision depends on imaging evidence, but the provenance of the image cannot be verified.
initial_state: The imaging artifact was available during authorization.
state_transition: Image provenance verification fails before execution.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated before relying on the imaging evidence.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires verifiable provenance for clinical evidence used in execution.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because imaging provenance cannot be verified.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when imaging evidence provenance is not verification-eligible.
clinical_action: Execute treatment based on unverifiable imaging artifact
